name: golang-github-jessevdk-go-flags-dev
title: golang-github-jessevdk-go-flags-dev
summary: Go library for parsing command line arguments
description:
Go library for parsing command line arguments
Package flags provides an extensive command line option parser.
.
The flags package is similar in functionality to the go builtin flag
package but provides more options and uses reflection to provide a
convenient and succinct way of specifying command line options.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-jessevdk-go-flags-dev because Go library for parsing command line arguments.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-jessevdk-go-flags-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-jessevdk-go-flags-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-jessevdk-go-flags-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
